items.content: Create LOTM domain engine modules (judgment, combat, status-effect, attribute-calc, damage-calc, pathway)
Fix remaining Fate refs in engine/core (state-file-projection, scene-beat-lifecycle.test)
Create LOTM domain module schemas
Create tests for new LOTM modules
Update tools/registry.ts for new tools
Fix data files + lookup + prompts (M4-M5)
Fix remaining test files, all 4 checks pass (M7)
修复所有文件移动后未更新的导入路径
同步 ConditionState / InventoryState / ProtagonistActorState 等 schema 变更
Phase 1a: 删 actor-display.ts，内联到 4 个消费点
Phase 1b: ensure-public-npc 改名 init-npc（4 个文件纯替换）
Phase 2: 把 changeOutfit 搬进 actor-impression.ts
Create engine/core/knowledge/ directory and move all files
Update secrets.ts internal import (../memory/memory.ts → ./memory.ts)
Update 4 engine/core/ files importing from memory/ or secrets/
Update 5 engine/tools/ files importing from core/memory/ or core/secrets/
Remove empty old directories engine/core/secrets/ and engine/core/memory/
Run typecheck && lint && format:check && test
Write lotm-rank.test.ts
Remove change-outfit from actor-condition-schema.ts (kind list, schema, union, validator)
Remove change-outfit handler from actor-condition.ts (import + switch case)
Remove outfit alias rerouting from actor-condition-normalizer.ts
Clean outfit params from update-actor-condition.ts tool definition
Create new update-actor-outfit.ts tool in tools/actor/
Register new tool in tools/registry.ts
Add changeActorOutfit test to actor-impression.test.ts
Update context.md documentation
Final: typecheck + lint + format + test
创建 engine/core/init/ 目录，合并 {campaign/campaign.ts + state/new-game-initialization.ts}
创建 engine/core/init/initial-state.ts（从 state/ 移入）
改名 state 字段 public.campaign → public.scenario（state.ts + state-schema.ts + initial-state.ts）
更新 state-file-projection.ts 的 campaign 引用
更新 parallel-line-assembler.ts
更新 get-state-schema.ts 字符串
更新 initialize-new-game.ts tool 描述 + 参数
更新 recall-memory.ts 工具描述
更新 memory.test.ts 测试名
删 engine/core/campaign/ 目录 + state/new-game-initialization.ts
bump CURRENT_STATE_SCHEMA_VERSION 5→6
pnpm format & typecheck & lint & test
Make category lenient: resolve aliases, search all docs, add score bonus
Make query matching looser: body/alias bigram fuzzy, single-term n-gram body match, lower threshold
Expose category in lookup tool, update description for keyword-only semantics
Typecheck + lint + format
Phase 1: gm-rules.md — 全部重写为 LOTM 硬规则
Phase 2: gm-context.md — 全部重写为 LOTM 世界设定
Phase 3: gm-tool-policy.md — 替换 Fate 工具为 LOTM 工具路由
Phase 4: gm-story-driver.md — 新增 LOTM 叙事驱动层
Phase 5: gm-style-rules.md — 替换 Fate flavor 为 LOTM 风味
Phase 6: gm-style-blacklist.md — 追加 LOTM 特有禁词
Phase 7: 边角收尾 (system-settlement, gm-social-guide, gm-settlement-principles)

Phase 9: 四项检查 + 验证

B8: debt visibility + resolve-by-id in update_economy
B9: economy currency conversion with type field
